title: Document Backend Folder Structure for Assessment Wellness Reports

requirements.text: Create comprehensive documentation explaining the backend folder structure related to Assessment and Wellness Reports, including the purpose and function of each folder and file

quotes: Mujhe Assessment Wellness Report se related Backend me bane folders or uske kya function hai use dijiye

acceptanceCriteria: Documentation lists all backend folders related to wellness reports
Each folder's purpose and function is clearly explained
Key files within folders are identified with their roles
Documentation is provided in both English and Hindi

requirements.text: Document the data models used for Assessment and Wellness Reports, including SectionId, SectionScores, MedicalHistory, UserAnswers, SolutionTip, and CompleteWellnessReport types
acceptanceCriteria: All data types are documented with their fields and purposes
Relationships between data models are explained
Validation functions for answers and scores are documented

requirements.text: Document available backend functions and API endpoints for wellness reports, including storage operations, ID generation, and data retrieval methods
acceptanceCriteria: All public functions are listed with their signatures
Function purposes and return types are documented
Usage examples are provided where applicable

requirements.text: Create a visual representation or structured outline showing how the backend components interact to generate and store wellness reports
acceptanceCriteria: Data flow from user input to report generation is documented
Storage and retrieval processes are explained

constraints: Documentation must be based on the actual backend/main.mo implementation
Do not modify existing backend code structure
Keep documentation accessible to both technical and non-technical users
nonGoals: Creating new data models or API endpoints
